---
title: "Identify extreme pricing behavior"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F)
```

### What I do
- Conduct a counterfactual in which margins have to be not greater than 0.1.
- There are THS establishments that choose extremely large wages and fees.
- Compare those establishments with other establishments in terms of actual prices and shares.


### Margin

```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/wage_too_high/margin_cdf.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/fee_too_high/margin_cdf.png"))
```


### Wage

```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/wage_too_high/wage_cdf.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/fee_too_high/wage_cdf.png"))
```

### Fee

```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/wage_too_high/fee_cdf.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/fee_too_high/fee_cdf.png"))
```


### Worker share

```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/wage_too_high/worker_share_cdf.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/fee_too_high/worker_share_cdf.png"))
```

### Client firm share

```{r, out.width = "50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/wage_too_high/firm_share_cdf.png"))
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/margin_constraint/extreme_pricing/fee_too_high/firm_share_cdf.png"))
```
